prestazioni: Replace the factory **383 RB (Raised Block) V8 (engine code: A-383)** with a **Mopar Performance 440 Stroker Kit (PN P5153767)**, featuring a forged **Callies Compstar 4340 crankshaft (4.25" stroke)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods (6.385" length)**, and **JE Pistons forged aluminum slugs (12.5:1 compression, dome-top for high-octane race fuel compatibility)**. Pair with a **Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (0.544" lift, 248° duration @ 0.050", 110° LSA)** and **Crane Cams roller rockers (1.6:1 ratio)** for aggressive valvetrain dynamics.

Install a **Holley Sniper EFI 4500 intake manifold (PN 550-4500)** with dual **FAST 102mm throttle bodies** and a **Holley Dominator ECU (PN 556-111)** tuned via **HP Tuners VCM Suite** for precise fuel mapping. Supplement with a **Nitrous Express Pro Shot Fogger system (150hp progressive shot, dual-stage, wet kit)** and a **Moroso 8-quart oil pan (PN 20140)** with a **Melling high-volume oil pump (PN M55HV)** for sustained high-RPM lubrication.

Swap the factory **727 TorqueFlite transmission** for a **Keisler TKO-600 5-speed manual (close-ratio, 2.87/1.89/1.28/1.00/0.82 gears)** with a **McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 10.5" diaphragm, 1,200 lb-ft torque capacity)** and a **QuickTime bellhousing (SFI 6.1 certified)**. Rear end upgrades include a **Mopar Performance 8.75" Sure-Grip differential (4.10:1 gear ratio)** with **Richmond Gear ring & pinion** and **Moser 31-spline axles** for drag strip durability.
estetica: Apply a **Fiberglass Trends '70-'74 Cuda Pro Touring widebody kit** with **custom-molded front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang)** and **rear diffuser (dual-plane, 3D-printed ABS plastic)** for aggressive aero. Paint in **PPG Vibrance Collection 'Plum Crazy' (code: FC7) with a 3-stage pearl flake finish** and **House of Kolor 'Kandy Apple Red' ghost flames (hand-brushed, 20% opacity)** on the hood and fenders.

Replace the factory steel wheels with **Forgeline GA3R 18x9.5" (front) and 18x11" (rear) forged 3-piece wheels (ET25 offset, 5x4.5" bolt pattern)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear)**. Brake system upgrades include **Wilwood 6-piston front calipers (14" rotors, slotted & drilled)** and **Baer 4-piston rear calipers (13" rotors)** with **EBC Yellowstuff brake pads** for track-ready stopping power.

Interior modifications feature **Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2 competition spec)** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip)**. The dashboard is replaced with a **Classic Instruments Velocity Stack gauge cluster (160mph speedo, 10k RPM tach, oil pressure/voltage/water temp analog dials)** and a **custom aluminum center console (CNC-machined, housing a **Racepak IQ3 data logger** and **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge**).
